heading: Transparency reports and reporting of physician ownership or investment interests
label: 1320a–7h Transparency reports and reporting of physician ownership or investment interests

children.heading: Payments or other transfers of value
children.label: 1 Payments or other transfers of value
i
children.text: The name of the covered recipient.

children.label: ii
children.text: The business address of the covered recipient and, in the case of a covered recipient who is a physician, the specialty and National Provider Identifier of the covered recipient.

children.label: iii
children.text: The amount of the payment or other transfer of value.

children.label: iv
children.text: The dates on which the payment or other transfer of value was provided to the covered recipient.

children.label: I
children.text: cash or a cash equivalent;

children.label: II
children.text: in-kind items or services;

children.label: III
children.text: stock, a stock option, or any other ownership interest, dividend, profit, or other return on investment; or

children.label: IV
children.text: any other form of payment or other transfer of value (as defined by the Secretary).

children.label: I
children.text: consulting fees;

children.label: II
children.text: compensation for services other than consulting;

children.label: III
children.text: honoraria;

children.label: IV
children.text: gift;

children.label: V
children.text: entertainment;

children.label: VI
children.text: food;

children.label: VII
children.text: travel (including the specified destinations);

children.label: VIII
children.text: education;

children.label: IX
children.text: research;

children.label: X
children.text: charitable contribution;

children.label: XI
children.text: royalty or license;

children.label: XII
children.text: current or prospective ownership or investment interest;

children.label: XIII
children.text: direct compensation for serving as faculty or as a speaker for a medical education program;

children.label: XIV
children.text: grant; or

children.label: XV
children.text: any other nature of the payment or other transfer of value (as defined by the Secretary).

children.label: vii
children.text: If the payment or other transfer of value is related to marketing, education, or research specific to a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply, the name of that covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply.

children.label: viii
children.text: Any other categories of information regarding the payment or other transfer of value the Secretary determines appropriate.

children.heading: Special rule for certain payments or other transfers of value
children.label: B Special rule for certain payments or other transfers of value
children.text: In the case where an applicable manufacturer provides a payment or other transfer of value to an entity or individual at the request of or designated on behalf of a covered recipient, the applicable manufacturer shall disclose that payment or other transfer of value under the name of the covered recipient.

children.label: A
children.text: The dollar amount invested by each physician holding such an ownership or investment interest.

children.label: B
children.text: The value and terms of each such ownership or investment interest.

children.label: C
children.text: Any payment or other transfer of value provided to a physician holding such an ownership or investment interest (or to an entity or individual at the request of or designated on behalf of a physician holding such an ownership or investment interest), including the information described in clauses (i) through (viii) of paragraph (1)(A), except that in applying such clauses, “physician” shall be substituted for “covered recipient” each place it appears.

children.label: D
children.text: Any other information regarding the ownership or investment interest the Secretary determines appropriate.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B) except as provided in paragraph (2), any applicable manufacturer or applicable group purchasing organization that fails to submit information required under subsection (a) in a timely manner in accordance with rules or regulations promulgated to carry out such subsection, shall be subject to a civil money penalty of not less than $1,000, but not more than $10,000, for each payment or other transfer of value or ownership or investment interest not reported as required under such subsection. Such penalty shall be imposed and collected in the same manner as civil money penalties under subsection (a) of are imposed and collected under that section.section 1320a–7a of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: B Limitation
children.text: The total amount of civil money penalties imposed under subparagraph (A) with respect to each annual submission of information under subsection (a) by an applicable manufacturer or applicable group purchasing organization shall not exceed $150,000.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), any applicable manufacturer or applicable group purchasing organization that knowingly fails to submit information required under subsection (a) in a timely manner in accordance with rules or regulations promulgated to carry out such subsection, shall be subject to a civil money penalty of not less than $10,000, but not more than $100,000, for each payment or other transfer of value or ownership or investment interest not reported as required under such subsection. Such penalty shall be imposed and collected in the same manner as civil money penalties under subsection (a) of are imposed and collected under that section.section 1320a–7a of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: B Limitation
children.text: The total amount of civil money penalties imposed under subparagraph (A) with respect to each annual submission of information under subsection (a) by an applicable manufacturer or applicable group purchasing organization shall not exceed $1,000,000.

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 3 Use of funds
children.text: Funds collected by the Secretary as a result of the imposition of a civil money penalty under this subsection shall be used to carry out this section.

children.heading: Procedures for submission of information and public availability
children.label: c Procedures for submission of information and public availability
i
children.text: for applicable manufacturers and applicable group purchasing organizations to submit information to the Secretary under subsection (a); and

children.label: ii
children.text: for the Secretary to make such information submitted available to the public.

children.heading: Definition of terms
children.label: B Definition of terms
children.text: The procedures established under subparagraph (A) shall provide for the definition of terms (other than those terms defined in subsection (e)), as appropriate, for purposes of this section.

children.label: i
children.text: is searchable and is in a format that is clear and understandable;

children.label: ii
children.text: contains information that is presented by the name of the applicable manufacturer or applicable group purchasing organization, the name of the covered recipient, the business address of the covered recipient, the specialty of the covered recipient, the value of the payment or other transfer of value, the date on which the payment or other transfer of value was provided to the covered recipient, the form of the payment or other transfer of value, indicated (as appropriate) under subsection (a)(1)(A)(v), the nature of the payment or other transfer of value, indicated (as appropriate) under subsection (a)(1)(A)(vi), and the name of the covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply, as applicable;

children.label: iii
children.text: contains information that is able to be easily aggregated and downloaded;

children.label: iv
children.text: contains a description of any enforcement actions taken to carry out this section, including any penalties imposed under subsection (b), during the preceding year;

children.label: v
children.text: contains background information on industry-physician relationships;

children.label: vi
children.text: in the case of information submitted with respect to a payment or other transfer of value described in subparagraph (E)(i), lists such information separately from the other information submitted under subsection (a) and designates such separately listed information as funding for clinical research;

children.label: vii
children.text: contains any other information the Secretary determines would be helpful to the average consumer;

children.label: viii
children.text: in the case of information made available under this subparagraph prior to , does not contain the National Provider Identifier of the covered recipient, andJanuary 1, 2022

children.label: ix
children.text: subject to subparagraph (D), provides the applicable manufacturer, applicable group purchasing organization, or covered recipient an opportunity to review and submit corrections to the information submitted with respect to the applicable manufacturer, applicable group purchasing organization, or covered recipient, respectively, for a period of not less than 45 days prior to such information being made available to the public.

children.heading: Clarification of time period for review and corrections
children.label: D Clarification of time period for review and corrections
children.text: In no case may the 45-day period for review and submission of corrections to information under subparagraph (C)(ix) prevent such information from being made available to the public in accordance with the dates described in the matter preceding clause (i) in subparagraph (C).

children.heading: Delayed publication for payments made pursuant to product research or development agreements and clinical investigations
children.label: E Delayed publication for payments made pursuant to product research or development agreements and clinical investigations
I
children.text: The date of the approval or clearance of the covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply by the Food and Drug Administration.

children.label: II
children.text: Four calendar years after the date such payment or other transfer of value was made.

children.heading: Confidentiality of information prior to publication
children.label: ii Confidentiality of information prior to publication
children.text: Information described in clause (i) shall be considered confidential and shall not be subject to disclosure under or any other similar Federal, State, or local law, until on or after the date on which the information is made available to the public under such clause.section 552 of title 5

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 2 Consultation
children.text: In establishing the procedures under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall consult with the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services, affected industry, consumers, consumer advocates, and other interested parties in order to ensure that the information made available to the public under such paragraph is presented in the appropriate overall context.

children.heading: Annual reports and relation to State laws
children.label: d Annual reports and relation to State laws
A
children.text: The information submitted under subsection (a) during the preceding year, aggregated for each applicable manufacturer and applicable group purchasing organization that submitted such information during such year (except, in the case of information submitted with respect to a payment or other transfer of value described in subsection (c)(1)(E)(i), such information shall be included in the first report submitted to Congress after the date on which such information is made available to the public under such subsection).

children.label: B
children.text: A description of any enforcement actions taken to carry out this section, including any penalties imposed under subsection (b), during the preceding year.

children.heading: Annual reports to States
children.label: 2 Annual reports to States
children.text: Not later than and on June 30 of each calendar year thereafter, the Secretary shall submit to States a report that includes a summary of the information submitted under subsection (a) during the preceding year with respect to covered recipients in the State (except, in the case of information submitted with respect to a payment or other transfer of value described in subsection (c)(1)(E)(i), such information shall be included in the first report submitted to States after the date on which such information is made available to the public under such subsection).September 30, 2013

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: A .—In general
children.text: In the case of a payment or other transfer of value provided by an applicable manufacturer that is received by a covered recipient (as defined in subsection (e)) on or after , subject to subparagraph (B), the provisions of this section shall preempt any statute or regulation of a State or of a political subdivision of a State that requires an applicable manufacturer (as so defined) to disclose or report, in any format, the type of information (as described in subsection (a)) regarding such payment or other transfer of value.January 1, 2012

children.label: i
children.text: not of the type required to be disclosed or reported under this section;

children.label: ii
children.text: described in subsection (e)(10)(B), except in the case of information described in clause (i) of such subsection;

children.label: iii
children.text: by any person or entity other than an applicable manufacturer (as so defined) or a covered recipient (as defined in subsection (e)); or

children.label: iv
children.text: to a Federal, State, or local governmental agency for public health surveillance, investigation, or other public health purposes or health oversight purposes.

children.label: C
children.text: Nothing in subparagraph (A) shall be construed to limit the discovery or admissibility of information described in such subparagraph in a criminal, civil, or administrative proceeding.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 4 Consultation
children.text: The Secretary shall consult with the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services on the implementation of this section.

children.heading: Applicable group purchasing organization
children.label: 1 Applicable group purchasing organization
children.text: The term “applicable group purchasing organization” means a group purchasing organization (as defined by the Secretary) that purchases, arranges for, or negotiates the purchase of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply which is operating in the United States, or in a territory, possession, or commonwealth of the United States.

children.heading: Applicable manufacturer
children.label: 2 Applicable manufacturer
children.text: The term “applicable manufacturer” means a manufacturer of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply which is operating in the United States, or in a territory, possession, or commonwealth of the United States.

children.heading: Clinical investigation
children.label: 3 Clinical investigation
children.text: The term “clinical investigation” means any experiment involving 1 or more human subjects, or materials derived from human subjects, in which a drug or device is administered, dispensed, or used.

children.heading: Covered device
children.label: 4 Covered device
children.text: The term “covered device” means any device for which payment is available under subchapter XVIII or a State plan under subchapter XIX or XXI (or a waiver of such a plan).

children.heading: Covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply
children.label: 5 Covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply
children.text: The term “covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply” means any drug, biological product, device, or medical supply for which payment is available under subchapter XVIII or a State plan under subchapter XIX or XXI (or a waiver of such a plan).

children.label: i
children.text: A physician.

children.label: ii
children.text: A teaching hospital.

children.label: iii
children.text: A physician assistant, nurse practitioner, or clinical nurse specialist (as such terms are defined in ).section 1395x(aa)(5) of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: A certified registered nurse anesthetist (as defined in ).section 1395x(bb)(2) of this title

children.label: v
children.text: A certified nurse-midwife (as defined in ).section 1395x(gg)(2) of this title

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: B Exclusion
children.text: Such term does not include a physician, physician assistant, nurse practitioner, clinical nurse specialist, certified nurse anesthetist, or certified nurse-midwife who is an employee of the applicable manufacturer that is required to submit information under subsection (a).

children.heading: Employee
children.label: 7 Employee
children.text: The term “employee” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395nn(h)(2) of this title

children.heading: Knowingly
children.label: 8 Knowingly
children.text: The term “knowingly” has the meaning given such term in .section 3729(b) of title 31

children.heading: Manufacturer of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply
children.label: 9 Manufacturer of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply
children.text: The term “manufacturer of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply” means any entity which is engaged in the production, preparation, propagation, compounding, or conversion of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply (or any entity under common ownership with such entity which provides assistance or support to such entity with respect to the production, preparation, propagation, compounding, conversion, marketing, promotion, sale, or distribution of a covered drug, device, biological, or medical supply).

children.heading: Payment or other transfer of value
children.label: 10 Payment or other transfer of value

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “payment or other transfer of value” means a transfer of anything of value. Such term does not include a transfer of anything of value that is made indirectly to a covered recipient through a third party in connection with an activity or service in the case where the applicable manufacturer is unaware of the identity of the covered recipient.

children.label: i
children.text: A transfer of anything the value of which is less than $10, unless the aggregate amount transferred to, requested by, or designated on behalf of the covered recipient by the applicable manufacturer during the calendar year exceeds $100. For calendar years after 2012, the dollar amounts specified in the preceding sentence shall be increased by the same percentage as the percentage increase in the consumer price index for all urban consumers (all items; U.S. city average) for the 12-month period ending with June of the previous year.

children.label: ii
children.text: Product samples that are not intended to be sold and are intended for patient use.

children.label: iii
children.text: Educational materials that directly benefit patients or are intended for patient use.

children.label: iv
children.text: The loan of a covered device for a short-term trial period, not to exceed 90 days, to permit evaluation of the covered device by the covered recipient.

children.label: v
children.text: Items or services provided under a contractual warranty, including the replacement of a covered device, where the terms of the warranty are set forth in the purchase or lease agreement for the covered device.

children.label: vi
children.text: A transfer of anything of value to a covered recipient when the covered recipient is a patient and not acting in the professional capacity of a covered recipient.

children.label: vii
children.text: Discounts (including rebates).

children.label: viii
children.text: In-kind items used for the provision of charity care.

children.label: ix
children.text: A dividend or other profit distribution from, or ownership or investment interest in, a publicly traded security and mutual fund (as described in ).section 1395nn(c) of this title

children.label: x
children.text: In the case of an applicable manufacturer who offers a self-insured plan, payments for the provision of health care to employees under the plan.

children.label: xi
children.text: In the case of a covered recipient who is a licensed non-medical professional, a transfer of anything of value to the covered recipient if the transfer is payment solely for the non-medical professional services of such licensed non-medical professional.

children.label: xii
children.text: In the case of a covered recipient who is a physician, a transfer of anything of value to the covered recipient if the transfer is payment solely for the services of the covered recipient with respect to a civil or criminal action or an administrative proceeding.

children.heading: Physician
children.label: 11 Physician
children.text: The term “physician” has the meaning given that term in .section 1395x(r) of this title
